# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for linkerd authz missing and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: frontend-server
  namespace: frontend
spec:
  port: 8080
  proxy:
    inbound:
      policy:
        - name: allow-frontend
          namespace: frontend
          serviceAccount: frontend-svc
        - name: allow-backend
          namespace: backend
          serviceAccount: backend-svc
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: backend-server
  namespace: backend
spec:
  port: 8080
  proxy:
    inbound:
      policy:
        - name: allow-frontend
          namespace: frontend
          serviceAccount: frontend-svc
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: frontend-to-backend
  namespace: backend
spec:
  server:
    name: backend-server
    namespace: backend
  rules:
    - authenticated:
        serviceAccount:
          name: frontend-svc
          namespace: frontend
      ports:
        - 8080
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: backend-to-frontend
  namespace: frontend
spec:
  server:
    name: frontend-server
    namespace: frontend
  rules:
    - authenticated:
        serviceAccount:
          name: backend-svc
          namespace: backend
      ports:
        - 8080
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: internal-communication
  namespace: backend
spec:
  server:
    name: backend-server
    namespace: backend
  rules:
    - authenticated:
        serviceAccount:
          name: backend-svc
          namespace: backend
      ports:
        - 8080
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: internal-communication-frontend
  namespace: frontend
spec:
  server:
    name: frontend-server
    namespace: frontend
  rules:
    - authenticated:
        serviceAccount:
          name: frontend-svc
          namespace: frontend
      ports:
        - 8080

apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: frontend-server
  namespace: frontend
spec:
  port: 8080
  proxy:
    inbound:
      policy:
        - name: allow-frontend
          namespace: frontend
          serviceAccount: frontend-svc
        - name: allow-backend
          namespace: backend
          serviceAccount: backend-svc
---

  namespace: backend

  port: 8080
  proxy:
    inbound:
      policy:
        - name: allow-frontend
          namespace: frontend
          serviceAccount: frontend-svc
---

  name: frontend-to-backend
  namespace: backend
spec:
  server:
    name: backend-server
    namespace: backend
  rules:
    - authenticated:
        serviceAccount:
          name: frontend-svc
          namespace: frontend
      ports:
        - 8080
---

kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: backend-to-frontend
  namespace: frontend
spec:
  server:
    name: frontend-server
    namespace: frontend
  rules:
    - authenticated:
        serviceAccount:
          name: backend-svc
          namespace: backend
      ports:
        - 8080

    name: backend-server
    namespace: backend

    - authenticated:
        serviceAccount:
          name: backend-svc
          namespace: backend

        - 8080

kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: internal-communication-frontend
  namespace: frontend
spec:
  server:
    name: frontend-server
    namespace: frontend

        serviceAccount:
